description: Describes requirements for one team-member slot: level range, race, occupation, gender, rebirth count, and more. An array of these is stored in the variable section when m_ulTeamMemsWanted > 0.

fields.name: m_ulLevelMin
fields.description: Minimum level for this team slot (0 = no minimum).

fields.name: m_ulLevelMax
fields.description: Maximum level for this team slot (0 = no maximum).

fields.name: m_bSameFamily
fields.description: Must be in the same family as the task holder.

fields.name: m_ulMinCount
fields.description: Minimum number of members satisfying these conditions.

fields.name: m_ulMaxCount
fields.description: Maximum number of members satisfying these conditions.

fields.name: m_ulTask
fields.description: Required task ID that members must have active or completed.
